title: Scheduled PDF Export format is not correct
excerpt: This has been a longtime issue and seems to be a major deficencty.  Scheduled PDF exports will change the format everytime..  Sometimes they come across completely blank, if any data is shown it will almost certainly cut…

posts.author: efowler (Eric Fowler)
posts.cookedHtml:
This has been a longtime issue and seems to be a major deficencty. Scheduled PDF exports will change the format everytime.. Sometimes they come across completely blank, if any data is shown it will almost certainly cut off half or more of the widgets. Any solutions that people have found? And no, I am not interested in an app that solves this, it should be functional in the basic monday.com framework.

FORMAT DIFFERENCES1547×884 156 KB
